things.name: MONA (Museum of Old and New Art)
things.description: Australia's most controversial museum - a subterranean world of provocative art

things.name: Mount Wellington (kunanyi)
things.description: 1,271m dolerite mountain looming over Hobart with spectacular summit views

things.name: Salamanca Market
things.description: Australia's finest outdoor market every Saturday at the historic sandstone wharf precinct

things.name: Battery Point
things.description: Hobart's oldest residential neighbourhood with colonial cottages and Arthur's Circus

things.name: Cascade Brewery
things.description: Australia's oldest brewery operating since 1832 in a Gothic building below the mountain

things.name: Tasmanian Museum & Art Gallery
things.description: Tasmania's natural history, thylacine (Tasmanian tiger) exhibits and colonial art

things.name: Port Arthur Historic Site
things.description: Haunting ruins of the infamous convict settlement on the Tasman Peninsula

things.name: Freycinet National Park
things.description: Pink granite mountains, pristine Wineglass Bay and white sandy beaches

things.name: Bruny Island
things.description: Wild southern island with cheese farm, wildlife cruises and pristine beaches

things.name: Hobart Waterfront & Constitution Dock
things.description: Historic docks with waterfront restaurants and the finish of the Sydney-Hobart yacht race
